summary: Applied Uptime Kuma live on docker-runtime-lv3, published it at uptime.lv3.org, and bootstrapped repo-managed local auth state.

verification.observed: The Uptime Kuma container was running from /opt/uptime-kuma on docker-runtime-lv3.
uptime.lv3.org served Uptime Kuma through the NGINX edge.
The control machine stored durable Uptime Kuma auth material under .local/uptime-kuma and seeded six monitors.

notes: This receipt was backfilled from repository history and the current recorded platform state.
